metadata.description: Curated Claude Code plugins for AI agent development, workflows, full-stack development, and analysis

plugins.name: ai-dev
plugins.description: Production-grade agentic AI patterns using LangGraph + Pydantic AI + CrewAI. Includes /ai-dev skill and ai-agent-developer agent.

plugins.name: prompt-engineering
plugins.description: Design, optimize, and manage LLM prompts with focus on reliability, efficiency, and measurable outcomes. Includes /prompt-engineering skill and prompt-engineer agent.

plugins.name: agent-team
plugins.description: Orchestrate Claude Code Agent Teams with contract-first design, dynamic teammate specialization, and structured quality gates. Adds a /agent-team skill.

plugins.name: braindump2spec
plugins.description: Transform rough brain dumps into developer-ready specifications through structured iterative Q&A interviews. Adds a /braindump2spec skill.

plugins.name: brainstorming
plugins.description: Structured exploration of user intent, requirements, and design before any creative or implementation work. Adds a /brainstorming skill.

plugins.name: branch
plugins.description: Create new git branches with corresponding planning directories. Adds a /branch skill.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Comprehensive technical code review covering completeness, security, performance, and best practices. Includes /code-review skill and code-reviewer agent.

plugins.name: spec2plan
plugins.description: Transform feature specifications into comprehensive, actionable implementation plans. Includes spec2plan orchestrator and spec2plan_sub domain expert agents.

plugins.name: electron-dev
plugins.description: Build secure, performant cross-platform desktop applications with Electron. Includes /electron-development skill and electron-developer agent.

plugins.name: fullstack-dev
plugins.description: End-to-end feature delivery from database to UI with seamless integration. Includes /fullstack-development skill and fullstack-developer agent.

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.description: Institutional-grade equity research with chance/risk reports, DCF valuation, and investment recommendations for US-listed stocks. Adds a /equity-research skill.

plugins.name: pencil-pen-generator
plugins.description: Generate and convert Pencil .pen design files — the JSON-based format used by pencil.dev for describing UI designs. Adds a /pencil-pen-generator skill.

plugins.name: uiux-design-penpot
plugins.description: Professional UI/UX design in Penpot using MCP tools. Covers Plugin API, design tokens with inline binding, generation recipes, prototyping, and known issues. References shared design knowledge from uiux-design-system. Adds a /uiux-design-penpot skill.

plugins.name: uiux-design-tailwindv4
plugins.description: Production-ready Tailwind CSS v4 design systems with CSS-first configuration, semantic tokens, OKLCH colors, component patterns (CVA), responsive layouts, dark mode, and accessibility. Includes optional shadcn/ui depth for rapid component development. Adds a /uiux-design-tailwindv4 skill.

plugins.name: uiux-design-vue3
plugins.description: Vue 3 development skills prioritizing Composition API with <script setup> for all greenfield work. Covers best practices, routing (Vue Router 4), Pinia state management, testing (Vitest/Playwright), debugging, JSX, Options API (brownfield only), and adaptable composables.

plugins.name: uiux-design-system
plugins.description: Comprehensive design system architecture guide: component hierarchy (atoms/molecules/organisms/patterns/screens), 3-tier token system, W3C DTCG format, naming conventions, UX decision patterns, layout decisions, content voice, responsive rules, accessibility standards, and visual reference structuring. Adds a /uiux-design-system skill.

plugins.name: uiux-image2design
plugins.description: Analyze UI screenshots with vision, extract a design system, confirm with the user, then generate tokens, component boards, and sample screens in Penpot or Figma via MCP. Detects available tool and delegates to the corresponding plugin. Adds a /uiux-image2design skill.

plugins.name: uiux-design-figma
plugins.description: Professional UI/UX design in Figma using figma-console-mcp. Covers 57+ tools, variable/collection tokens, auto-layout, component variants, variable binding, and design system implementation. Adds a /uiux-design-figma skill.
